prompt_rules.description_brief: Write in a precise, technical, specs-forward tone for LoopRug. Buyers here want facts: dimensions, materials, condition. The opening should note a key practical detail (pile height, fit under doors/transitions, corridor use). Keep it clean, direct, and informative. No poetry — just accurate, confidence-building copy.
prompt_rules.description_example_template:
{opening}

◈ PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS
SKU ............... {urun_id}
Dimensions ........ {boyut_ft} / {boyut_cm} cm
Total Area ........ {sqft} sq ft / {metrekare} sq m
Color Palette ..... {renk_scheme}
Pattern ........... {pattern}
{pile_bullet}
Construction ...... Handwoven
Material .......... Wool
Origin ............ {koken}

◈ ABOUT THIS RUG
{hikaye}

◈ CARE GUIDE
Regular light vacuuming. Spot clean with mild solution as needed. Avoid prolonged direct moisture.

◈ SHIPPING & LOGISTICS
→ Dispatch: within 1 business day
→ Delivery: 2–4 business days worldwide
→ Packaging: double-wrapped, corner-protected
→ Duties/Taxes: fully covered — no additional charges on delivery

◈ RETURNS
14-day return window from delivery date. Contact us to initiate — process is straightforward.

◈ ORDER CANCELLATION
Cancel anytime before dispatch. Message us directly.

Store: looprug.etsy.com
